headline: Nucor (NUE) Stock Valuation Reassessed After Strong Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Nucor (NUE) is drawing fresh attention after recent share price moves, with the stock showing double digit returns over the past month and over the past 3 months. That performance is prompting investors to reassess its valuation. See our latest analysis for Nucor. At a share price of US$266.35, Nucor’s recent momentum is strong, with a 30 day share price return of 17.32% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 122.23%. Together, these figures point to a sharp re-rating by the market. If this...

headline: Oil’s 5.7% Weekly Drop Opens the Door for Jets, Materials, and Infrastructure ETFs
summary: Crude oil settling near $95 a barrel after touching almost $115 in early April has handed the market a cleaner rotation setup than anything tech has offered in months. The IBD Stock Market Today host made the call directly: with USO breaking its 10-week moving average and the 10-year Treasury yield retreating from mid-May highs, ...
